# Pull Request

## Purpose

Describe what changed and why.

## Requirement impact

- [ ] No requirement changes
- [ ] Requirements added/changed/retired
- Requirement IDs:

## Test impact

- [ ] `python tools/run_all_audits.py` passes
- [ ] New/changed tests documented
- Test IDs:

## Revision/document impact

- [ ] Changelog updated
- [ ] Touched controlled docs updated with revision/date
- [ ] Manifest regenerated if package contents changed

## Safety/security/licensing impact

- [ ] No safety/security/licensing impact
- [ ] Safety classification reviewed
- [ ] Security scan reviewed
- [ ] License/attribution reviewed

## Non-regression statement

Explain how existing package capabilities were preserved.
